title.en: The top of the Blood Fang, the nearby territory.

content.en:
The top of the Blood Fang, the nearby territory.

Ye Tian quickly chose a target.

"That's him!"

Ye Tian found a fifth-time bone transformation creature, killed it in an instant, and then copied the opponent's body.

However, he made a move, and soon a strong man from the top of the Blood Fang came to check.

But Ye Tian had already annihilated his true body copy body, so the top of the blood tooth didn't find anything at all.

That's it.

Ye Tian blended into the top of the blood tooth.

This time, his goal was to take out a sixth-time Bone Transformation Realm Breaking Genius at the top of the Blood Fangs, the Lord of Yanze!

Although this Lord of Yan Ze is only a sixth-time bone transformation realm genius and his strength is not very strong, he is proficient in the Golden Script of the Other Shore and the Divine Weapon Casting Technique of the Other Side, and can even create a medium Divine Soldier of the Other Side.

Therefore, the identity of this Lord of Yanze is very noble, and his status is no less than that of the sixth-level envoy of Gu Heng Mountain, second only to the status of the Lord of Honor.

But.

This Lord of the Flame rarely leaves the Top of the Bloodfangs, so it would be difficult to kill him.

Even if you really leave the top of the Blood Fang, your whereabouts are not easy to expose.

After Ye Tian mixed into the top of the Blood Fang, he deliberately curryed favor with this Lord of Yanze, and occasionally took out some materials to offer to the Lord of Yanze.

Gradually, the Lord of the Flame Ze had a very good relationship with him.

Of course, the Lord of Yanze treated Ye Tian as a subordinate.

this day.

The time was almost up, and Ye Tian offered a relatively rare material-True Yang Ancient Stone!

This kind of material is not known at all in the ordinary bone transformation realm, and it is only after Ye Tian joined Gu Heng Mountain that he exchanged the knowledge of the Divine Weapon Casting Technique on the other side, and then he knew this material.

This is a special material for refining the divine weapon on the other side, he exchanged some in Guheng Mountain, handed over the replica body vest at the top of the Blood Fang, and prepared to present it to the Lord of Yanze, and then revealed that it was found from a mysterious treasure place.

......

"Lord of Yanze, this is a mysterious material I found in a mysterious treasure place, I don't know what use it is, but I think it is very unusual, I specially come to dedicate it to you, Lord of Yanze!"

Ye Tian took out the True Yang Ancient Stone and said.

"True Yang Ancient Stone !!"

The Lord of the Flame was very excited.

"Did you find one?"

The Lord of Flame asked.

"I didn't look carefully, but as soon as I entered, I found five!" Ye Tian took out four more True Yang Ancient Stones.

"I just went in and found five!"

The Lord of the Flame was very excited.

This means that there are definitely a lot of True Yang Ancient Stones there.

"Take me to that place!"

The Lord of the Flame Ze hadn't thought it was a trap, so he didn't suspect it.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently.

He took the Lord of Yanze to that place, and of course there was no such place, just a place he had made up.

......

Soon.

Ye Tian took the Lord of Yanze out of the range of the top of the Blood Fang, constantly shuttling, heading to the distance.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian stopped.

"Have you arrived?"

The Lord of Flame asked.

Then.

Ye Tian said: "Lord of Yanze, I didn't reach my destination, because there was no such place. "

"Lord of the Wind, what do you mean?"

The Lord of the Flame was furious.

"I'll let the Lord of Yanze fall!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"It's up to you, looking for death!"

The Lord of Yan Ze killed Ye Tian's duplicate body with a single blow.

And Ye Tian didn't resist, after all, this replica body was meant to be given up, and there was no point in keeping it.

"This is dead?"

The Lord of Yanze was a little confused.

He also thought that the Lord of Suo Feng was hiding his strength, how powerful it was, but he was directly killed by him, so what was the point of the other party doing this?

Abrupt.

A figure appeared, intercepting him as he was about to leave.

It was also a five-time bone transformation realm, but the other party's aura was extremely terrifying.

What arrived was Ye Tian's true body copying body.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian shot directly.

The primeval-level geniuses of the five-time bone transformation realm and the boundary-breaking geniuses of the sixth-time bone transformation realm are essentially similar in combat power.

However, Ye Tian is a top-notch primordial-level genius, and he also knows how to use a technique on the other side.

The Lord of Yanze is naturally not an opponent!

But the Lord of Yanze was not weak, and immediately sacrificed a medium other side of the divine armor, as well as a medium other side of the divine soldier long knife.

Bang!

Ye Tian's Ancient God and Demon Spear hit the body of the Lord of Yanze, and was blocked by the armor of the divine soldiers on the other side.

However, the Lord of the Flame was still injured.

"The art of the other side - the tentacles of the other side!"

In the void, black tentacles emerged, directly penetrating the armor of the divine soldiers on the other side and penetrating the body of the Lord of Yanze.

But this other side technique didn't hurt the Lord of Yanze, because this was not an offensive move in the first place.

The Tentacles of the Other Shore is a very strange art of the Other Shore, once it penetrates the enemy's body, it will cause a special effect, that is, damage stacking.

At this time.

Ye Tian used the Ancient God Demon Spear to hit the Lord of Yanze with one blow, directly causing the Lord of Yanze to vomit blood, and his whole body was extremely painful.

Bang bang bang!!!

Attacks hit again and again, causing the injuries of the Lord of Yanze to continue to stack.

"The Lord of Yanze must have asked for help, and he must fight quickly!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian performed another technique on the other side - the illusion world on the other side!

After this other side technique was cast, the immeasurable will of the Lord of Yanze seemed to be trapped, and the immeasurable will was not in harmony with the physical body, and it was difficult to exert the strength it should have.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian attacked the Lord of Yan Ze again and again, making the Lord of Yan Ze completely unable to bear it, and the medium armor of the divine weapon on his body could not protect him.

Bang!

The Lord of Yanze was completely killed, leaving no life left, and all his will was shattered.

After killing the Lord of Yanze, Ye Tian directly took away the body of the Lord of Yanze, and then fled quickly.

Soon after.

A nine-stage bone transformation realm primeval genius descended at the top of the Blood Fang, but he didn't find the Lord of Yan Ze, and he couldn't even contact the Lord of Yan Ze.

And the top of the blood tooth calculated and learned that the Lord of Yanze had fallen.

Suddenly, the entire top of the Blood Fang was furious.

However, at this moment, Ye Tian had already come to Guheng Mountain.

He handed over the body of the Lord of Yanze to Gu Hengshan as soon as possible, and submitted the task of killing the Lord of Yanze.

This task has always been on the task list of Gu Heng Mountain.

But now, this task has been completed by Ye Tian, which is a huge credit.

Killing the Lord of Yanze dealt a blow to the top of the Blood Fangs, causing the top of the Blood Fang to lose a medium other Divine Weapon Refiner.

There are many junior Divine Weapon Refiners on the other side, but the middle Divine Weapon Refiners on the other side are extremely rare, even in Gu Heng Mountain, there are no more than ten such middle Divine Weapon Refiners on the other side.

What's more, Yan Zezhi's major is still very low, his potential is very high, and he even hopes to become a high-level divine weapon refiner on the other side in the future.

That's why the life of the Lord of Yanze is precious!
